## Checklist

**Run tests and make sure your solution works** before requesting review.

- [ ] I ran `pytest` and all tests pass
- [ ] I started the app and manually verified the change works
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, `.env`, or personal cache/library files
- [ ] Docs are updated if needed (`README`, `CONTRIBUTING`, etc.)
- [ ] This PR is focused and ready for review
